SELECT y FROM t_null WHERE isNotNull(y);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_null WHERE isNotNull(y);
SELECT y, isNotNull(y) AS is_not_null_status FROM t_null;
SELECT DISTINCT y FROM t_null WHERE isNotNull(y);
SELECT t1.x FROM t1 JOIN t_null ON isNotNull(t_null.y) WHERE t1.x = 2;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_null WHERE isNotNull(y)) AS not_null_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_null) AS total_count;
SELECT t1.x, t2.z FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.x = t2.z WHERE isNotNull(t2.z);
SELECT (SELECT AVG(y) FROM t_null WHERE isNotNull(y)) AS average_not_null;
CREATE TABLE t3 (a Nullable(String), b Int32);
SELECT a, b, isNotNull(a) AS is_a_not_null FROM t3 WHERE isNotNull(a) OR b > 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT y FROM t_null WHERE isNotNull(y)) AS subquery;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE isNotNull(z)) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE z IS NULL) AS difference;
